prestazioni: J35Y6 3.5L V6 engine (direct-injection, 280hp stock) upgraded with a **CT Engineering Stage 2+ supercharger kit** (Eaton TVS2300 blower, 8-10psi boost, custom billet intake manifold, and intercooler core by **Vortech Engineering**), paired with a **Hondata KPro4 standalone ECU** (custom-tuned for 400whp on 93 octane, with knock retard monitoring via **AEM CD-7 dash logger**)

**K-Tuned J35-specific forged internals** (Manley I-beam connecting rods, JE 9.5:1 forged pistons, ACL Race Series bearings, and **Ferrea Competition Series intake/exhaust valves** with **Supertech valve springs/retainers**) to handle 8,000 RPM safely, mated to a **Quaife ATB helical LSD** (Honda Pilot-specific 4.56:1 gear ratio) for improved torque vectoring

**Full exhaust system by Agency Power** (3.5" mandrel-bent 304 stainless steel headers with **GESI high-flow catalytic converters**, 3" mid-pipe with **Borla Pro XS mufflers** (resonated for cabin refinement), and **AP Racing 350mm brake rotors** with **Hawk HT-10 brake pads** (front) and **DBA 5000 Series rotors** (rear) for fade resistance under spirited driving
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit** (Honda Pilot Elite-specific, 3-piece front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rocker extensions with **custom carbon fiber overfenders** by **Seibon Carbon**), paired with a **Rocket Bunny V3-style front lip** and **custom 3D-printed rear diffuser** (integrated **OEM-style LED reverse lights**)

**Work Emotion CR Kiwami 20x10 +35 (front) and 20x11 +40 (rear) wheels** (custom concave design, **12.5" and 13" wide Nitto NT05R tires** (285/35/20 and 305/30/20), with **H&R Sport Lowering Springs** (1.2" drop) and **Tein Flex Z coilovers** (adjustable damping, 16-way compression/rebound) for stance and handling

**Full custom interior by Status Racing** (recaro SPG XL seats with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**, **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel** (350mm, suede), **Alcantara headliner/dash wrap**, and **custom rear seat delete** (replaced with **carbon fiber storage trays** and **dual 12" JL Audio 12W7 subwoofers** in a sealed enclosure)
